title: Research Associate
description:
About Nuevocor

Nuevocor is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing novel therapies for genetic cardiomyopathies driven by aberrant mechanobiology, headquartered in Singapore with offices in the U.S. and Europe. Our unique approach, enabled by our proprietary PrOSIA mechanobiology platform, overcomes the limitations of traditional gene replacement therapy to treat defects in shared disease pathways across multiple cardiomyopathies. By addressing the root cause of disease, Nuevocor develops first-in-disease therapies for genetic cardiomyopathies that are not amenable to gene replacement therapy and have no effective treatment options.

We are looking for highly motivated Research Associates to join our Discovery & Pipeline Program. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in an innovative, translational and fast-paced global biotech environment and is eager to participate in mission-oriented R&D focused on targeted outcomes.


Key Responsibilities

  • Execute and support in vivo mouse studies as part of preclinical AAV gene therapy programs, with a strong focus on mouse husbandry, transgenic colony management, and experimental animal work.
  • Work with company scientists to execute and troubleshoot experiments in a variety of areas, including lead optimization and preclinical development of AAV gene therapy for genetic cardiomyopathies.
  • Contribute to multiple projects and work with collaborators to achieve project milestones.
  • Keep detailed and accurate records of experiments, data and analysis to support and protect intellectual property of the company.
  • Contribute to lab management


Qualifications

  • Minimum Bachelor’s degree in Life Sciences or related fields.
  • Willing to work with mice, preferably with hands-on experience.
  • At least one of the following technical capability areas is required.

- Experience working with in vivo mouse models, such as transgenic colony management, administration of
drugs, tissue harvesting and processing; and/or
- Experience in cell and molecular biology and biochemistry, such as cell culture, transfections, molecular
cloning, PCR, qPCR, Western blots, ELISA, immunoprecipitations, immunofluorescence microscopy

  • Experience in cardiac phenotyping (e.g. echocardiography), AAV vectors, or proteomics would be advantageous.
  • Keen interest in translational research and comfortable working efficiently to meet timeline and milestones.
  • High standards in documentation.
  • Good time management and proactive attitude.
  • Excellent communication skills and ability to work in a team.


What We Offer

  • A unique opportunity to contribute to a cutting-edge biotech company at a pivotal stage.
  • Exposure to executive-level decision-making and strategic initiatives across the company.
  • A collaborative and inclusive culture that values initiative and growth.
  • Competitive compensation package.


Nuevocor is an equal opportunity and equal benefits employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment. 

If you are passionate about science and business and want to be part of a team driving meaningful change in cardiovascular medicine, we would love to hear from you. Please submit a CV and cover letter to http://tinyurl.com/nuevocorcareer

postedCompany.description: Nuevocor is a pre-clinical stage biopharmaceutical start-up dedicated to developing gene therapies to treat the underlying cause of genetic cardiomyopathies. Backed by an international syndicate of reputable venture capital firms, it will focus on advancing its lead program to clinical trials. It will also leverage its platform technology, underpinned by a deep understanding of cardiac cell biology and novel cardiotropic viral vectors, to discover and develop therapies for genetic cardiomyopathies
postedCompany.name: NUEVOCOR PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
